description: A wide-angle security-camera still of a large room with rows of long wooden benches on a tiled floor, white walls with posters, and a dark counter area at the back where two people stand near a doorway. A timestamp in the upper left reads '10:46:42 3/5/2026'. A red arrow has been added pointing toward the people at the back. A video-player control bar is visible along the bottom edge of the screenshot.
